query: CREATE PRIMARY INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ON `testmigrate`.`_default`.`users`
CREATE INDEX idx_users_email IF NOT EXISTS ON `testmigrate`.`_default`.`users`(email)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_id IF NOT EXISTS ON `testmigrate`.`_default`.`orders`(user_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_created_at IF NOT EXISTS ON `testmigrate`.`_default`.`orders`(created_at)
